title: Section 5
content: The1[appointment of the enrolled members of the Force shall rest with the Director-General] who shall exercise that power in accordance with rules made under this Act: Provided that the power of appointment under this section may also be exercised by such other supervisory officer as the Central Government may by order specify in this behalf.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 6, ibid., for certain words (w.e.f. 15-6-1983)
